narrative: Hot US CPI and reports of rebuilt Iran missile sites drive a geopolitical risk premium—gold higher +0.46% near $4,708; equities -0.16%; DXY +0.02%; VIX 18.0. USD/JPY firms to 157.70 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry offsets hawkish OECD projections for a 2% terminal rate. AUD leads G8 (+0.56% avg) on a +300bp carry advantage over CHF, while NZD/USD at 0.5944 eyes the RBNZ meeting on May 27 following a jump in inflation expectations.
